name: Entry
description: run() called 使用 執行輸入

name: CooldownCheck
description: Consult Cooldown.shouldThrottle(sid, 步驟, threshold)

name: AttemptKind
description: Try 下一個 kind 在 KIND CHAIN (entered repeatedly 直到 kind succeeds 或 chain exhausted)

name: WriteAnchor
description: Executor returned summary 文字; write Anchor 到 訊息 串流
actions: Append part of type 'compaction' with kind metadata

name: MaybeInjectContinue
description: Conditional branch based 在 INJECT CONTINUE[observed]
actions: If injectContinue: append synthetic user message with text 'Continue if you have next steps...'

name: MarkCompacted
description: 更新 Memory.lastcompacted於 供 cooldown

name: SuccessExit
description: 返回 '繼續' 到 caller

name: ChainExhausted
description: All kinds 在 chain failed 或 were unavailable

name: StopExit
description: 返回 'stop' 到 caller

name: ThrottledExit
description: 返回 '繼續' immediately; cooldown blocked execution
Initial 項目
Cooldown active, abort
Begin kind-chain walk
Kind succeeded; proceed 到 anchor write

condition: kind unavailable OR returned null AND chain has more entries
description: Self-loop: try 下一個 kind. Each transition emits 記錄.info 使用 attempted kind 與 reason 供 falling through (AGENTS.md rule 1).

condition: chain exhausted (all kinds tried, none succeeded)
description: 無 kind worked
Proceed 到 optional 繼續 injection

condition: always (whether or not Continue was injected)
description: Mark compacted regardless
Success 路徑 完成
Chain exhaustion → stop 結果
